summary: Phase 3 Modal Consolidation Testing - AuthDialog with VerifyPinDialog and TotpVerifyDialog wrappers. Successfully verified VerifyPinDialog wrapper opens AuthDialog in PIN mode from Sales History page with all expected elements (PIN input, discrepancy toggle, Cancel/Verify buttons). Code review confirms correct implementation of thin wrapper pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthDialog.js correctly implements dual-mode rendering: PIN mode (line 155-292) uses custom overlay with z-9999, TOTP mode (line 297-402) uses Shadcn Dialog
VerifyPinDialog.js is a proper thin wrapper (7 lines) that passes props to AuthDialog with mode='pin'
TotpVerifyDialog.js is a proper thin wrapper (8 lines) that passes props to AuthDialog with mode='totp'
All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented: auth-dialog-pin, auth-dialog-totp, auth-pin-input, auth-submit-btn, auth-cancel-btn, auth-mode-pin, auth-mode-totp, auth-mode-password
Backward compatibility maintained - all page imports unchanged (InvoiceDetailModal, ExpensesPage, AccountingPage, ProductsPage, etc.)
test_credentials: Super Admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325, Manager PIN: 521325
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 modal consolidation complete. AuthDialog.js is the unified component. VerifyPinDialog and TotpVerifyDialog are thin wrappers. Tested VerifyPinDialog on Sales History - works correctly. TotpVerifyDialog is used for inventory correction on Products page (non-admin users only). Session persistence issues during testing but core functionality verified.

tests_performed.details: Clicked sale row -> InvoiceDetailModal opened -> Clicked Verify button -> AuthDialog (PIN mode) opened with data-testid='auth-dialog-pin'. Shows PIN input, discrepancy toggle, Cancel and Verify Transaction buttons.
Verified: auth-pin-input, auth-submit-btn, auth-cancel-btn, Flag a discrepancy toggle all present
Dual-mode rendering correct. PIN mode uses custom overlay (z-9999), TOTP mode uses Shadcn Dialog. All data-testids present.
VerifyPinDialog and TotpVerifyDialog are thin wrappers that correctly pass props to AuthDialog
All page imports unchanged - InvoiceDetailModal, ExpensesPage, AccountingPage, ProductsPage, BranchTransferPage, PurchaseOrderPage all import wrappers correctly

tests_not_completed.reason: TotpVerifyDialog is triggered by inventory correction for non-admin users. Session persistence issues prevented full testing. Code review confirms correct implementation.

Session lost before completing toggle test. Code review confirms discrepancy fields (Item/Description, Expected, Found, Unit, Unit Cost, Note) are correctly implemented in AuthDialog.js lines 222-263.
